Our system tracks inventory and valuation rates per site, offering detailed insights into stock levels and financial metrics. a:["$","$L6","Comprehensive Inventory Control4",{"heading":"Comprehensive Inventory Control","body":"Minimize business losses with tight inventory control using our supermarket store management software. Effectively reduce theft, misplacement, and incorrect valuation that impact your current assets. Our comprehensive stock and inventory control module enhances operational efficiency by tracking items from purchase through warehousing to sales. Choose between FIFO or Moving Average methods for accurate valuation. The integrated inventory system provides a real-time view of product availability, stock levels across warehouses, and stock transfers. This ensures you maintain optimal stock levels, prevent damage, and streamline inventory management, ultimately safeguarding your assets and improving overall business performance.","image":"https://9t9it.com/images/supermarket/comprehensive-inventory-control.webp","imageAlt":"Comprehensive Inventory Control","reversed":false}]
b:["$","$L6","Total Accounting5",{"heading":"Total Accounting","body":"Our supermarket ERP software is supported by a robust international standard accounting system, ensuring full compliance with IFRS standards. The system automates ledger entries, minimizing manual data entry and enhancing accuracy. Key features include a comprehensive Chart of Accounts, management of Opening Account Balances, Taxes, Advance Payments, Budgeting, and Subscription Management. It offers automatic VAT calculations and generates VAT reports in accordance with local taxation laws. Detailed Profit and Loss statements and Balance Sheets can be analyzed by branch. Additionally, Accounts Payable and Receivable reports help manage cash flow effectively, while precise item valuation, including all indirect costs, ensures accurate profitability assessments.","image":"$undefined","imageAlt":"Total Accounting","reversed":true}]

Manage customer credit limits effectively and access detailed payment aging reports by customer, allowing you to monitor and optimize credit management and cash flow. Users can continue serving customers seamlessly without affecting sales transactions. Once the internet connection is restored, the system automatically synchronizes data, posting both accounting and stock entries. Our POS module features a clear, intuitive interface with easy search capabilities and a single checkout screen for efficient sales transactions and commonly used tasks. Compatible with any device, our user-friendly POS software is highly flexible and fully integrated with your inventory for real-time retail management. This ensures a smooth, reliable, and efficient sales process at all times.","image":"$undefined","imageAlt":"Offline Point of Sales Terminal","reversed":true}]
